visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP. Co-op terms allow legal work experience.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$9,500-15,000/年
🏢 校外租房：滑铁卢租金适中，Studio约C$1,200-1,600/月
📍 推荐区域：University Ave、Lester St
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$9,500-15,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Waterloo moderate rents, studio ~C$1,200-1,600/mo
📍 Recommended: University Ave, Lester St

graduationRate.zh: 本科五年毕业率约82%（含Co-op）。Co-op项目需五年完成本科。学术压力较大，但Co-op经验极有价值。
graduationRate.en: 5-year graduation rate ~82% (including co-op). Co-op programs require 5 years. Academically demanding but co-op experience is invaluable.

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约93%（含Co-op返聘）
💼 硅谷科技巨头（Google、Meta、Apple）、华尔街
🌟 Co-op使学生毕业前即积累2年工作经验
employment.en:
📊 ~93% employed within 6 months (including co-op return offers)
💼 Silicon Valley (Google, Meta, Apple), Wall Street
🌟 Co-op provides ~2 years work experience before graduation

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。校内有Health Services。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus Health Services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：2月1日
💰 申请费：C$170
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、AIF（入学信息表）、部分专业需视频面试或数学竞赛成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: February 1
💰 Fee: C$170
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, AIF, some programs need video interview or math competition results

city.zh: 安大略省 伦敦

majorTuition.zh:
Western国际生学费：
• 文科/社科：C$35,000/年
• 理科：C$39,000/年
• 商学(Ivey)：C$55,000/年
• 工程：C$53,000/年
majorTuition.en:
Western international tuition:
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$35,000/yr
• Science: C$39,000/yr
• Commerce (Ivey): C$55,000/yr
• Engineering: C$53,000/yr

desc.zh: 以Ivey商学院闻名，采用独特的案例教学法（Case Method），是加拿大顶尖商学院之一。校园被评为加拿大最美校园之一，校园文化活跃。
desc.en: Renowned for Ivey Business School, which uses the distinctive Case Method. One of Canada's top business schools. Campus rated among Canada's most beautiful with vibrant culture.

safetyDetail.zh: 伦敦(安省)是安静友好的中型城市，校园安全。提供24小时安保和免费护送服务。
safetyDetail.en: London, Ontario is a quiet, friendly mid-sized city with a safe campus. 24/7 security and free escort services.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-8°C至-1°C），降雪适中。夏季温暖（19-26°C）。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-8°C to -1°C) with moderate snow. Warm summers (19-26°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$10,000-15,000/年
🏢 校外租房：伦敦租金实惠，Studio约C$1,000-1,400/月
📍 推荐区域：Richmond Row、Old North
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$10,000-15,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: London affordable rents, studio ~C$1,000-1,400/mo
📍 Recommended: Richmond Row, Old North

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约77%，六年毕业率约84%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约88%
💼 Ivey商学院毕业生进入投行、咨询公司比例极高
🌟 校友网络在金融和咨询行业尤为强大
employment.en:
📊 ~88% employed within 6 months
💼 Ivey grads have very high placement in investment banking and consulting
🌟 Alumni network particularly strong in finance and consulting

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。校内有学生健康服务中心。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus Student Health Services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$155
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、部分专业需补充申请
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$155
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, supplementary application for some programs

city.zh: 安大略省 金斯顿

majorTuition.zh:
皇后大学国际生学费：
• 文科/社科：C$38,000/年
• 理科：C$42,000/年
• 商学(Smith)：C$58,000/年
• 工程：C$56,000/年
majorTuition.en:
Queen's international tuition:
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$38,000/yr
• Science: C$42,000/yr
• Commerce (Smith): C$58,000/yr
• Engineering: C$56,000/yr

desc.zh: 加拿大历史悠久的名校之一，Smith商学院是加拿大顶尖商学院。位于安大略湖畔的金斯顿市，校园古典优美，学生满意度全加拿大最高。以强烈的校园归属感著称。
desc.en: One of Canada's most historic universities. Smith School of Business is a top Canadian business school. Located on Lake Ontario in Kingston, with highest student satisfaction in Canada. Known for strong school spirit.

safetyDetail.zh: 金斯顿是非常安全的小城市，校园氛围温馨。社区治安极好，步行安全。
safetyDetail.en: Kingston is a very safe small city with a warm campus atmosphere. Excellent community safety; very walkable.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-10°C至-2°C），靠近安大略湖，降雪较多。夏季温暖（19-26°C）。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-10°C to -2°C), near Lake Ontario with significant snowfall. Warm summers (19-26°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$10,000-15,000/年
🏢 校外租房：金斯顿租金实惠，Studio约C$1,000-1,400/月
📍 推荐区域：University District
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$10,000-15,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Kingston affordable rents, studio ~C$1,000-1,400/mo
📍 Recommended: University District

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约82%，六年毕业率约89%。学生满意度极高。
graduationRate.en: 4-year graduation rate ~82%, 6-year rate ~89%. Extremely high student satisfaction.

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约90%
💼 Smith商学院毕业生在金融和咨询行业就业率极高
🌟 校友文化强大，毕业生互助网络活跃
employment.en:
📊 ~90% employed within 6 months
💼 Smith Commerce grads have excellent finance and consulting placement
🌟 Strong alumni culture with active support network

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。校内有学生健康服务中心。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus Student Wellness Services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：2月1日
💰 申请费：C$165
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、个人陈述/补充申请
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: February 1
💰 Fee: C$165
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, personal statement/supplementary application

city.zh: 新斯科舍省 哈利法克斯

majorTuition.zh:
达尔豪斯大学国际生学费：
• 文科：C$30,000/年
• 理科：C$33,000/年
• 商学(Rowe)：C$38,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$42,000/年
majorTuition.en:
Dalhousie international tuition:
• Arts: C$30,000/yr
• Science: C$33,000/yr
• Commerce (Rowe): C$38,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$42,000/yr

desc.zh: 大西洋加拿大地区最大的研究型大学，位于美丽的海港城市哈利法克斯。海洋科学全球领先，工程和医学实力强劲。生活成本相对较低，城市友好宜居。
desc.en: The largest research university in Atlantic Canada, in the beautiful port city of Halifax. World-leading in ocean sciences, strong in engineering and medicine. Relatively low living costs.

safetyDetail.zh: 哈利法克斯是友好安全的海港城市，人口约40万。校园安全，社区温馨。
safetyDetail.en: Halifax is a friendly, safe port city of ~400K people. Safe campus with a warm community.

climate.zh: 海洋性气候，冬季较冷（-8°C至0°C），降雪较多。夏季凉爽（16-23°C）。靠海湿度较大。
climate.en: Maritime climate. Cold winters (-8°C to 0°C) with significant snow. Cool summers (16-23°C). Higher humidity.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或大西洋移民试点项目(AIP)申请永久居留。AIP为大西洋省份独有的移民快速通道。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Atlantic Immigration Program (AIP). AIP is a unique fast-track for Atlantic provinces.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一优先，约C$8,500-13,000/年
🏢 校外租房：哈利法克斯租金低廉，Studio约C$1,000-1,400/月
📍 推荐区域：South End、North End
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Priority for first year, ~C$8,500-13,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Halifax low rents, studio ~C$1,000-1,400/mo
📍 Recommended: South End, North End

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约70%，六年毕业率约78%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约83%
💼 海洋产业、医疗、科技初创公司
🌟 大西洋移民计划(AIP)为留学生提供独特的移民优势
employment.en:
📊 ~83% employed within 6 months
💼 Ocean industry, healthcare, tech startups
🌟 Atlantic Immigration Program offers unique immigration advantages

healthcare.zh: ✅ 新斯科舍省国际学生需购买学校提供的健康保险计划，约C$900/年。
healthcare.en: ✅ Nova Scotia international students need university-provided health insurance, ~C$900/yr.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过Dalhousie官网申请
📅 截止日期：4月1日
💰 申请费：C$70
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via Dalhousie website
📅 Deadline: April 1
💰 Fee: C$70
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency

city.zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省 本拿比/温哥华

majorTuition.zh:
SFU国际生学费：
• 文科：C$33,000/年
• 理科：C$36,000/年
• 商学(Beedie)：C$45,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$52,000/年
majorTuition.en:
SFU international tuition:
• Arts: C$33,000/yr
• Science: C$36,000/yr
• Commerce (Beedie): C$45,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$52,000/yr

desc.zh: BC省创新型综合大学，三学期制让学生可以更灵活安排学业。Co-op项目优秀，商学院(Beedie)声誉良好。主校区位于本拿比山顶，建筑独特。
desc.en: An innovative BC university with a trimester system for flexible study. Excellent co-op programs and well-regarded Beedie School of Business. Main campus atop Burnaby Mountain with unique architecture.

safetyDetail.zh: 本拿比和温哥华治安良好。主校区在山顶，环境封闭安全。市中心校区交通便利。
safetyDetail.en: Burnaby and Vancouver have good safety. Main campus atop mountain is enclosed and secure. Downtown campus well-connected.

climate.zh: 温和的海洋性气候，冬季温和多雨（3-8°C），夏季凉爽（15-22°C）。山顶校区雾气较多。
climate.en: Mild oceanic climate. Warm, rainy winters (3-8°C), cool summers (15-22°C). Mountain campus can be foggy.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或BC省提名(BC PNP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or BC PNP.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：约C$9,000-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：本拿比/温哥华Studio约C$1,400-2,000/月
📍 推荐区域：UniverCity、Lougheed附近
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: ~C$9,000-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Burnaby/Vancouver studio ~C$1,400-2,000/mo
📍 Recommended: UniverCity, near Lougheed

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约68%（三学期制下许多学生提前毕业），六年毕业率约76%。
graduationRate.en: 4-year graduation rate ~68% (many students graduate early under trimester system), 6-year rate ~76%.

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约86%
💼 温哥华科技公司、媒体行业、商业咨询
🌟 Co-op项目与温哥华企业联系紧密
employment.en:
📊 ~86% employed within 6 months
💼 Vancouver tech companies, media, business consulting
🌟 Co-op programs closely connected to Vancouver businesses

healthcare.zh: ✅ BC省国际学生可加入MSP，等待期后享受基本医疗保障。SFU另有补充健康保险。
healthcare.en: ✅ BC international students eligible for MSP after waiting period. SFU also provides supplementary health insurance.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过SFU官网申请
📅 截止日期：1月31日
💰 申请费：C$75
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via SFU website
📅 Deadline: January 31
💰 Fee: C$75
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency

city.zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省 维多利亚

majorTuition.zh:
维多利亚大学国际生学费：
• 文科：C$32,000/年
• 理科：C$35,000/年
• 商学(Gustavson)：C$45,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$50,000/年
majorTuition.en:
UVic international tuition:
• Arts: C$32,000/yr
• Science: C$35,000/yr
• Commerce (Gustavson): C$45,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$50,000/yr

desc.zh: 位于BC省首府维多利亚市的综合性研究型大学，以Co-op项目闻名（加拿大第二大Co-op项目）。校园环境优美，气候是加拿大最温和的。海洋科学和清洁能源研究突出。
desc.en: A comprehensive research university in BC's capital Victoria, known for its co-op program (Canada's second largest). Beautiful campus with Canada's mildest climate. Strong in ocean science and clean energy.

safetyDetail.zh: 维多利亚是加拿大最安全的城市之一，治安极好。校园绿树环绕，环境宁静安全。
safetyDetail.en: Victoria is one of Canada's safest cities. Campus surrounded by greenery, quiet and secure environment.

climate.zh: 加拿大最温和的气候，冬季温和（3-8°C），极少降雪。夏季凉爽舒适（15-22°C）。全年适合户外活动。
climate.en: Canada's mildest climate. Mild winters (3-8°C) with rare snow. Cool summers (15-22°C). Year-round outdoor activities.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或BC省提名(BC PNP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or BC PNP.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$9,000-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：维多利亚Studio约C$1,300-1,800/月
📍 推荐区域：Gordon Head、Cadboro Bay
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$9,000-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Victoria studio ~C$1,300-1,800/mo
📍 Recommended: Gordon Head, Cadboro Bay

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约72%（含Co-op），六年毕业率约79%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约87%
💼 科技公司、政府（BC省府所在地）、清洁能源行业
🌟 Co-op项目使学生在毕业前积累丰富工作经验
employment.en:
📊 ~87% employed within 6 months
💼 Tech companies, government (BC's capital), clean energy
🌟 Co-op program provides rich work experience before graduation

healthcare.zh: ✅ BC省国际学生可加入MSP，等待期后享受基本医疗保障。UVic有补充健康保险计划。
healthcare.en: ✅ BC international students eligible for MSP after waiting period. UVic provides supplementary health insurance.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过UVic官网申请
📅 截止日期：2月28日
💰 申请费：C$125
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、个人陈述
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via UVic website
📅 Deadline: February 28
💰 Fee: C$125
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, personal statement

city.zh: 魁北克省 魁北克城

majorTuition.zh:
拉瓦尔大学国际生学费（法语授课）：
• 文科/社科：C$30,000/年
• 理科：C$31,500/年
• 工程：C$33,000/年
注：魁省法语大学学费相对实惠
majorTuition.en:
Laval international tuition (French instruction):
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$30,000/yr
• Science: C$31,500/yr
• Engineering: C$33,000/yr
Note: Quebec French universities have affordable tuition

desc.zh: 北美最古老的法语大学之一，位于美丽的世界遗产城市魁北克城。林学、农学在加拿大名列前茅。校园是北美最大的大学校园之一。注意：法语授课。
desc.en: One of North America's oldest French-language universities, in the beautiful UNESCO World Heritage city of Quebec City. Top-ranked in forestry and agriculture. One of North America's largest campuses. Note: French instruction.

safetyDetail.zh: 魁北克城是加拿大最安全的城市之一，犯罪率极低。校园宽广安全，社区友好。
safetyDetail.en: Quebec City is one of Canada's safest cities with very low crime rates. Spacious, safe campus with a friendly community.

climate.zh: 冬季漫长寒冷（-18°C至-7°C），降雪量非常大。夏季温暖宜人（18-25°C）。需要专业防寒装备。
climate.en: Long, cold winters (-18°C to -7°C) with very heavy snowfall. Pleasant warm summers (18-25°C). Professional winter gear essential.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或魁省PEQ项目申请永久居留。法语授课学生在PEQ移民中有显著优势。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Quebec PEQ. French-instruction students have significant advantage for PEQ.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：约C$6,500-11,000/年
🏢 校外租房：魁北克城租金极低，Studio约C$800-1,200/月
📍 推荐区域：Sainte-Foy、校园周边
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: ~C$6,500-11,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Quebec City very low rents, studio ~C$800-1,200/mo
📍 Recommended: Sainte-Foy, near campus

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约70%，六年毕业率约78%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约84%
💼 魁省政府、林业/农业、保险和金融
🌟 法语能力在魁省就业市场是必备技能
employment.en:
📊 ~84% employed within 6 months
💼 Quebec government, forestry/agriculture, insurance and finance
🌟 French proficiency is essential in Quebec job market

healthcare.zh: ✅ 魁省国际学生需加入RAMQ或购买学校健康保险计划。
healthcare.en: ✅ Quebec international students need RAMQ or university health insurance plan.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过Laval官网申请（魁省独立系统）
📅 截止日期：2月1日
💰 申请费：C$90
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、法语能力证明
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via Laval website (Quebec separate system)
📅 Deadline: February 1
💰 Fee: C$90
📝 Materials: Transcripts, French proficiency

city.zh: 曼尼托巴省 温尼伯

majorTuition.zh:
曼尼托巴大学国际生学费：
• 文科：C$30,000/年
• 理科：C$33,000/年
• 商学(Asper)：C$38,000/年
• 工程：C$42,000/年
majorTuition.en:
U of Manitoba international tuition:
• Arts: C$30,000/yr
• Science: C$33,000/yr
• Commerce (Asper): C$38,000/yr
• Engineering: C$42,000/yr

desc.zh: 西加拿大最古老的大学，位于曼尼托巴省首府温尼伯。工程学和农学研究实力强劲，生活成本是加拿大主要大学城中最低的之一。曼省移民政策对留学生非常友好。
desc.en: Western Canada's oldest university, in Manitoba's capital Winnipeg. Strong engineering and agriculture research. Among the lowest living costs of major Canadian university cities. Manitoba has very immigrant-friendly policies.

safetyDetail.zh: 温尼伯部分区域治安需注意，但校园安保完善。建议避免深夜独行于市中心某些区域。
safetyDetail.en: Some Winnipeg areas require caution, but campus security is comprehensive. Avoid walking alone late at night in certain downtown areas.

climate.zh: 冬季极寒（-25°C至-12°C），是加拿大最冷的大城市之一。夏季温暖（17-26°C）。需要最高级别的防寒装备。
climate.en: Extremely cold winters (-25°C to -12°C), one of Canada's coldest major cities. Warm summers (17-26°C). Top-tier winter gear essential.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或曼省省提名(MPNP)申请永久居留。MPNP是加拿大最友好的省提名项目之一，毕业即可申请。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Manitoba PNP (MPNP). MPNP is one of Canada's most accessible provincial nomination programs.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：约C$7,500-12,000/年
🏢 校外租房：温尼伯租金极低，Studio约C$800-1,200/月
📍 推荐区域：Fort Richmond、Pembina Highway
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: ~C$7,500-12,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Winnipeg very low rents, studio ~C$800-1,200/mo
📍 Recommended: Fort Richmond, Pembina Highway

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约65%，六年毕业率约74%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约82%
💼 农业、制造业、政府、医疗行业
🌟 MPNP省提名项目使曼省成为留学移民最容易的省份之一
employment.en:
📊 ~82% employed within 6 months
💼 Agriculture, manufacturing, government, healthcare
🌟 MPNP makes Manitoba one of easiest provinces for student immigration

healthcare.zh: ✅ 曼省国际学生可加入Manitoba Health，享受与本地居民相同的基本医疗保障。
healthcare.en: ✅ Manitoba international students eligible for Manitoba Health, same basic coverage as residents.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过UManitoba官网申请
📅 截止日期：3月1日
💰 申请费：C$100
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via UManitoba website
📅 Deadline: March 1
💰 Fee: C$100
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency

city.zh: 萨斯喀彻温省 萨斯卡通

majorTuition.zh:
萨斯喀彻温大学国际生学费：
• 文科：C$30,000/年
• 理科：C$32,000/年
• 商学(Edwards)：C$36,000/年
• 工程：C$40,000/年
majorTuition.en:
USask international tuition:
• Arts: C$30,000/yr
• Science: C$32,000/yr
• Commerce (Edwards): C$36,000/yr
• Engineering: C$40,000/yr

desc.zh: 位于加拿大草原省份的综合性研究型大学，拥有加拿大粒子加速器中心（CLS）。农学、兽医学和水资源研究全球知名。生活成本极低，校园沿河而建，风景优美。
desc.en: A comprehensive research university in Canada's prairie province, home to the Canadian Light Source (CLS) synchrotron. Globally known for agriculture, veterinary medicine, and water resources. Very low living costs; scenic riverside campus.

safetyDetail.zh: 萨斯卡通是友好的中小城市，校园安全。建议冬季注意出行安全。
safetyDetail.en: Saskatoon is a friendly small-medium city with a safe campus. Exercise winter travel caution.

climate.zh: 冬季极寒（-25°C至-12°C），是加拿大最冷的地区之一。夏季温暖干燥（16-25°C）。阳光充足。
climate.en: Extremely cold winters (-25°C to -12°C), among Canada's coldest. Warm, dry summers (16-25°C). Very sunny.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或萨省省提名(SINP)申请永久居留。SINP对留学生友好，门槛较低。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Saskatchewan PNP (SINP). SINP is immigrant-friendly with lower thresholds.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：约C$7,000-11,000/年
🏢 校外租房：萨斯卡通租金极低，Studio约C$750-1,100/月
📍 推荐区域：Varsity View、Nutana
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: ~C$7,000-11,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Saskatoon very low rents, studio ~C$750-1,100/mo
📍 Recommended: Varsity View, Nutana

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约63%，六年毕业率约72%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约80%
💼 农业、矿业、政府、医疗
🌟 SINP省提名使萨省成为移民友好省份
employment.en:
📊 ~80% employed within 6 months
💼 Agriculture, mining, government, healthcare
🌟 SINP makes Saskatchewan an immigrant-friendly province

healthcare.zh: ✅ 萨省国际学生可加入Saskatchewan Health，享受基本医疗保障。
healthcare.en: ✅ Saskatchewan international students eligible for Saskatchewan Health, basic medical coverage.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过USask官网申请
📅 截止日期：4月1日
💰 申请费：C$100
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via USask website
📅 Deadline: April 1
💰 Fee: C$100
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency

city.zh: 魁北克省 蒙特利尔

majorTuition.zh:
康考迪亚大学国际生学费：
• 文科/艺术：C$30,000/年
• 理科：C$33,000/年
• 商学(JMSB)：C$38,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$42,000/年
majorTuition.en:
Concordia international tuition:
• Arts/Fine Arts: C$30,000/yr
• Science: C$33,000/yr
• Commerce (JMSB): C$38,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$42,000/yr

desc.zh: 蒙特利尔的英语综合性大学，以艺术与设计、电影制作和游戏设计闻名。JMSB商学院获AACSB认证，工程和计算机科学持续进步。校园分布在市中心和西部两个校区。
desc.en: Montreal's English-language comprehensive university, known for art & design, film production, and game design. JMSB business school is AACSB-accredited. Two campuses: downtown and west end.

safetyDetail.zh: 蒙特利尔治安良好。市中心校区交通便利，西校区环境安静安全。
safetyDetail.en: Montreal has good safety. Downtown campus well-connected; west campus is quiet and secure.

climate.zh: 冬季漫长寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），降雪量大。夏季温暖湿润（20-26°C）。
climate.en: Long, cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) with heavy snow. Warm, humid summers (20-26°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或魁省PEQ项目申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Quebec PEQ.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：约C$9,000-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：蒙特利尔租金实惠，Studio约C$1,000-1,500/月
📍 推荐区域：NDG、Westmount附近
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: ~C$9,000-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Montreal affordable, studio ~C$1,000-1,500/mo
📍 Recommended: NDG, near Westmount

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约60%，六年毕业率约70%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约82%
💼 游戏产业（Ubisoft、EA）、影视制作、科技创业
🌟 艺术和设计专业在蒙特利尔创意产业中很受欢迎
employment.en:
📊 ~82% employed within 6 months
💼 Gaming (Ubisoft, EA), film production, tech startups
🌟 Art and design grads popular in Montreal's creative industry

healthcare.zh: ✅ 魁省国际学生需加入RAMQ或购买学校健康保险。
healthcare.en: ✅ Quebec international students need RAMQ or university health insurance.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过Concordia官网申请（魁省独立系统）
📅 截止日期：2月1日
💰 申请费：C$100
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、作品集（艺术专业）
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via Concordia website (Quebec separate system)
📅 Deadline: February 1
💰 Fee: C$100
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, portfolio (art programs)

city.zh: 安大略省 多伦多

majorTuition.zh:
TMU国际生学费：
• 文科/传媒：C$33,000/年
• 理科：C$36,000/年
• 商学(TRSM)：C$40,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$45,000/年
majorTuition.en:
TMU international tuition:
• Arts/Media: C$33,000/yr
• Science: C$36,000/yr
• Commerce (TRSM): C$40,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$45,000/yr

desc.zh: 位于多伦多市中心的应用型大学，以创业创新闻名。拥有加拿大最大的本科商学院之一，新闻传媒和创意产业专业实力强。校园地处多伦多最繁华地段，实习机会丰富。
desc.en: An applied university in downtown Toronto known for entrepreneurship. One of Canada's largest undergraduate business schools. Strong in journalism and creative industries. Campus in Toronto's busiest area with abundant internship opportunities.

safetyDetail.zh: 校园位于多伦多市中心，人流密集，整体安全。有校园安保和紧急电话系统。晚间注意周边环境。
safetyDetail.en: Campus in busy downtown Toronto, generally safe. Campus security and emergency phone system available. Be aware of surroundings at night.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-7°C至-1°C），常有降雪。夏季温暖宜人（20-27°C）。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-7°C to -1°C) with frequent snow. Pleasant summers (20-27°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：有限，约C$12,000-17,000/年
🏢 校外租房：多伦多市中心Studio约C$1,800-2,400/月
📍 推荐区域：Church-Yonge Corridor、Garden District
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Limited, ~C$12,000-17,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Downtown Toronto studio ~C$1,800-2,400/mo
📍 Recommended: Church-Yonge Corridor, Garden District

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约68%，六年毕业率约76%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约85%
💼 创业孵化器(DMZ)全球排名第一，科技创业氛围浓厚
🌟 位于多伦多市中心，实习和就业机会极其便利
employment.en:
📊 ~85% employed within 6 months
💼 DMZ startup incubator ranked #1 globally; strong tech entrepreneurship
🌟 Downtown Toronto location offers exceptional internship and job access

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：2月1日
💰 申请费：C$150
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: February 1
💰 Fee: C$150
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency

city.zh: 安大略省 渥太华

majorTuition.zh:
卡尔顿大学国际生学费：
• 文科/社科：C$33,000/年
• 理科：C$36,000/年
• 商学(Sprott)：C$42,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$48,000/年
majorTuition.en:
Carleton international tuition:
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$33,000/yr
• Science: C$36,000/yr
• Commerce (Sprott): C$42,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$48,000/yr

desc.zh: 位于加拿大首都渥太华的综合性大学，以工程、计算机科学、国际事务和新闻专业闻名。与联邦政府和科技行业联系紧密，Co-op项目优秀。校园沿Rideau运河而建，环境优美。
desc.en: A comprehensive university in Canada's capital Ottawa, known for engineering, CS, international affairs, and journalism. Strong ties to federal government and tech sector. Excellent co-op programs. Beautiful campus along the Rideau Canal.

safetyDetail.zh: 渥太华是加拿大首都，治安非常好。校园沿运河而建，环境安静安全。
safetyDetail.en: Ottawa is Canada's capital with excellent safety. Campus along the canal, quiet and secure environment.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），降雪量大。夏季温暖（20-26°C）。校园地下通道系统可避寒。
climate.en: Cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) with heavy snow. Warm summers (20-26°C). Campus underground tunnel system helps beat the cold.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$9,500-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：渥太华租金中等，Studio约C$1,200-1,600/月
📍 推荐区域：Old Ottawa South、Glebe
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$9,500-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Ottawa moderate rents, studio ~C$1,200-1,600/mo
📍 Recommended: Old Ottawa South, Glebe

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约68%，六年毕业率约76%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约85%
💼 联邦政府、科技公司（Shopify、BlackBerry QNX）、国防产业
🌟 Co-op项目与政府和科技行业合作广泛
employment.en:
📊 ~85% employed within 6 months
💼 Federal government, tech (Shopify, BlackBerry QNX), defence
🌟 Co-op programs with extensive government and tech partnerships

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。校内有健康服务中心。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus Health Services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：4月1日
💰 申请费：C$150
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: April 1
💰 Fee: C$150
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency
